landing.tagline: Payment and contract management for motorcycle riders.

login.title: Sign in
login.heading: Login to your account
login.forgotPin: Forgot your PIN? Contact the owner.
login.ownerLink: Are you the owner? Sign in here
login.invalidCredentials: Phone number or PIN is incorrect.
login.locked: Account temporarily locked. Please try again later.
login.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

pin.weak: That PIN is too easy to guess. Choose another.
pin.mustChange: Please change your temporary PIN before continuing.
pin.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
pin.wrongCurrent: The current PIN is not correct. If it is a temporary PIN, enter it exactly as given.
pin.locked: Too many attempts. Wait 30 minutes and try again.
pin.failed: Could not change the PIN. Try again.

header.title: Rider application
header.subtitle: Fill in this form step by step. Your details are saved on this device until you submit.

fields.licenceOptionalHint: If you have one — not required
fields.guarantorIntro: Guarantor details. One guarantor is required. They will receive a confirmation SMS.
fields.gPhoneHint: They will receive a confirmation SMS

docs.fileType: File type not allowed. Use PDF, JPG or PNG.
docs.fileExtension: The file extension is not valid.
docs.fileSize: The file is too large (4MB limit).

declaration.text: I confirm that the information I have provided is true and correct. I understand that false information may lead to my application being rejected.
declaration.checkbox: I accept the terms and declaration above.

review.name: Name
review.note: Make sure all details are correct before submitting. You will receive a reference number after submission.

errors.name: Invalid name
errors.district: Choose a district in the selected region
errors.age: You must be 18 years or older
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
errors.fileRejected: One or more files were rejected. Check your documents.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit the application. Please try again.
errors.duplicate: An application with these details already exists.
errors.alreadySubmitted: Your application has already been received — only the document uploads are being finished. Press Submit again if an upload was interrupted.

success.title: Application received
success.message: Thank you. Your application has been received and will be reviewed. Keep your reference number.
